windows.command: Write-Host 'Quality check is currently configured for Linux/devcontainer workflow.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

linux.command: bash -lc 'if [ -f /opt/esp/idf/export.sh ]; then . /opt/esp/idf/export.sh > /dev/null 2>&1; elif [ -f /opt/esp/esp-idf-v6/export.sh ]; then . /opt/esp/esp-idf-v6/export.sh > /dev/null 2>&1; elif [ -n "$IDF_PATH" ] && [ -f "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" ]; then . "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" > /dev/null 2>&1; else echo "ESP-IDF export.sh not found"; exit 1; fi; bash scripts/run_quality_checks.sh'

windows.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; & cmd /c '"C:\Users\i4studio\esp\v6.0\esp-idf\export.bat" && idf.py build'; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Write-Host ''; Write-Host '========== COVERAGE OUTPUT ==========' -ForegroundColor Cyan; if (Test-Path 'tests/build/coverage_html/index.html') { Write-Host 'HTML report: tests/build/coverage_html/index.html' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'HTML report not found at tests/build/coverage_html/index.html' -ForegroundColor Yellow }; if (Test-Path 'tests/build/coverage.xml') { Write-Host 'Cobertura XML: tests/build/coverage.xml' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host 'Cobertura XML not found at tests/build/coverage.xml' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

linux.command: bash -lc 'if [ -f /opt/esp/idf/export.sh ]; then . /opt/esp/idf/export.sh > /dev/null 2>&1; elif [ -f /opt/esp/esp-idf-v6/export.sh ]; then . /opt/esp/esp-idf-v6/export.sh > /dev/null 2>&1; elif [ -n "$IDF_PATH" ] && [ -f "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" ]; then . "$IDF_PATH/export.sh" > /dev/null 2>&1; else echo "ESP-IDF export.sh not found"; exit 1; fi; if [ -f build/CMakeCache.txt ]; then stale_cmake=$(sed -n "s/^CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=//p" build/CMakeCache.txt | head -n 1); if [ -n "$stale_cmake" ] && [ ! -x "$stale_cmake" ]; then echo "Detected stale CMake path in build cache: $stale_cmake"; idf.py reconfigure; fi; fi; idf.py build && echo "" && echo "========== INTEGRATION TESTS ==========" && ctest --test-dir /tmp/esp32framework2-tests-build -N -R "IntegrationTest|AppMainIntegrationTest" && ctest --test-dir /tmp/esp32framework2-tests-build -R "IntegrationTest|AppMainIntegrationTest" --output-on-failure --progress; echo ""; echo "========== COVERAGE OUTPUT =========="; [ -f tests/build/coverage_html/index.html ] && echo "HTML report: tests/build/coverage_html/index.html" || echo "HTML report not found at tests/build/coverage_html/index.html"; [ -f tests/build/coverage.xml ] && echo "Cobertura XML: tests/build/coverage.xml" || echo "Cobertura XML not found at tests/build/coverage.xml"'
